description:
Overview:

Multifunctional Desk Lamp: LED Desk Lamp, Digital Alarm Clock, Natural Sounds, and Wake Up Light are integrated into the design. You can use this multifunctional bedside lamp while working, studying, and sleeping, it is a nice bedside alarm clock.
Natural Sound: There are a total of 10 natural sounds for you to choose from, including 01birdsong, 02 ocean wave, 03 flowing water, 04 bonfires, 05 summer night, 06 thunderstorm, 07 fan, 08 rain, 09 music box,10 clock ticking. In natural sound mode, you can schedule a playback time of 30 minutes/60 minutes/90 minutes for the selected sound.
Thress-stage Brightness Options: Our night lights offer 3 brightness levels (Low, Medium, and High). Highly sensitive touch control, simply click anywhere on the lamp bar to instantly turn on the bedside lamp.
Wake-Up Alarm Clock: The wake-up light turns on 10 minutes before the set alarm time. You can also press the Snooze button, and get an extra 10 minutes of sleep. Up to 3 times snooze which brings convenience to your life.
Ideal Gifts for Family and Friends: The exquisite packaging design is a good choice for gifts. Gift ideas for birthday holidays Christmas gifts, unique gifts for women, men, dad, mom, wife, sisters or best friend.


Product information:
Size: 225x51x228mm
Specifications: American Standard, European standard, winning bid
Style: Creative
Additional functions: alarm clock, music, ambience light


Packing list:
Bedside lamp * 1
